results.memory: v0.4 HYBRID-REBALANCE plan: MCP transport for Claude Code, REST/OpenAPI for Codex/ChatGPT surfaces. Decision made 2026-04-20 after research in docs/research/2026-04-20-mcp-vs-api-cli.md. Trigger to revisit: if Codex ships native MCP support or CC drops HTTP plugin support.

metadata.title: ADR: Hybrid transport rebalance — MCP for CC, REST for Codex/ChatGPT

results.memory: Token-cost baseline measurement plan (Phase 0): 6 locations — MCP tool schemas, memory_search response payloads, memory_list response payloads, SessionStart injection (state.md only), summarizer prompt. Tokenizer methodology: tiktoken o200k_base primary for mixed surfaces, @anthropic-ai/tokenizer secondary; emphasize Anthropic numbers for CC-consumed surfaces.

Vault web UI (D.5.2–D.5.4) deferred to v0.4+, tracked in GH issue #16 since 2026-04-21. Decision: multi-user and shared-host requirements unclear; revisit when direction clarifies. Plugin approach confirmed as the short-term path for all surfaces.

metadata.title: Vault web UI deferred to v0.4+

results.memory: Use Opus-pair reviews for all design-depth plans, specs, and architecture docs. Two Opus reviewers with different lenses (e.g. one for correctness, one for scalability). Sonnet misses design gaps in plan review. Established as a standing workflow preference after v0.3.0-alpha planning sessions.

metadata.title: Use Opus-pair reviews for design-depth plans

results.memory: All code in universal-memory must default to scalable, generic-enough-for-future-extensibility designs: data-driven over hardcoded, dependency injection at module boundaries, version contracts in all storage formats. This is an in-scope quality bar, not scope expansion — applies to every task in v0.4 and beyond.

Token-cost baseline measurement plan (Phase 0): 6 locations with tiktoken primary, anthropic secondary.
Vault web UI (D.5.2–D.5.4) deferred to v0.4+, tracked in GH issue #16.

metadata.title: Use Opus-pair reviews for design-depth plans

memory_list.memory: All code must default to scalable, generic-enough-for-future-extensibility designs.
Session-end hook writes raw captures to $VAULT/captures/<project>/raw/<date>.md. Summarizer runs async via python3 + openai API. Daily cap default 50 to control costs.

v0.3.0-alpha shipped four surfaces: Claude Code MCP plugin, Codex REST plugin, ChatGPT Custom GPT Actions, um-tunnel reverse proxy. OpenAPI spec served at /openapi.yaml with ?gpt=1 trimmed mode for ChatGPT.

Temporal decay re-ranking: UM_TEMPORAL_DECAY=true enables exponential decay with configurable half-life (UM_DECAY_HALF_LIFE_DAYS, default 30). Applied after status filter so superseded docs are excluded before re-ranking.
Docker Compose stack: Qdrant vector store on port 6333, mem0 HTTP server on port 8765. Health check at /health. Stack managed by plugins/docker-compose.yml. Volume: qdrant_data for persistence.

Frontmatter schema v1: required fields are schema_version, type, id, title. Optional: project, status (current/superseded/deprecated/rejected), valid_from (ISO-8601), invalidated_at. Parsed by parseFrontmatter() in mem0-mcp-http.mjs.
